title: The Best Happy Mail
excerpt: I'm constantly amazed at the kindness of creatives. You may remember this post about Buster . Several days later, I saw this on Instagram and was so touched by the incredible gesture and caption . Then I got this happy…
body: I'm constantly amazed at the kindness of creatives. You may remember this post about Buster. Several days later, I saw this on Instagram and was so touched by the incredible gesture and caption. Then I got this happy mail a few weeks later:
